event: resuscitation to sinus tachycardia required 10 min
severe hypercapnic acidosis from inadequate minute ventilation required neuromuscular blockade (NMB)
0.25–0.5 MAC isoflurane as the sole sedative
absent motor response to painful stimulus
preserved pupillary, corneal, cough and gag reflexes
severe GSM, refractory to three antiepileptic medications
